com.github.dakusui.actionunit.visitors

Interface ActionRunner.IgnoredInPathCalculation

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    ActionRunner.IgnoredInPathCalculation.Composite, ActionRunner.IgnoredInPathCalculation.Concurrent, ActionRunner.IgnoredInPathCalculation.Sequential, ActionRunner.IgnoredInPathCalculation.With
    Enclosing class:
    ActionRunner

    public static interface ActionRunner.IgnoredInPathCalculation
    This interface is used to suppress path calculation, which is performed by ActionRunner.WithResult and its printer.

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Interface and Description
      static class  ActionRunner.IgnoredInPathCalculation.Composite 
      static class  ActionRunner.IgnoredInPathCalculation.Concurrent 
      static class  ActionRunner.IgnoredInPathCalculation.Sequential
      A sequential action created by and run as a part of ForEach action.
      static class  ActionRunner.IgnoredInPathCalculation.With<U>
      A "with" action created by and run as a part of ForEach action.
